subjects.description: An adult pedestrian standing still on the dusty sidewalk curb, facing the oncoming ego vehicle, wearing a white short-sleeve t-shirt with a large red octagonal stop sign graphic printed across the chest, squinting slightly in the bright sun.
subjects.appearance_details: Casual desert attire with light trousers and dusty boots; the bold stop sign graphic dominates the shirt's front, sharply lit by the harsh overhead sun.
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest for the ego vehicle as it passes; remains stationary relative to the moving camera.
subjects.location: Initially center-right background, moving toward right midground and then right foreground as the car approaches and passes.
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame initially, growing to Medium as the vehicle nears.
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera (the ego vehicle) directly, front toward the lens.
subjects.pose: Standing upright, feet planted on the curb, arms relaxed at sides, head oriented toward the approaching car.
subjects.action: Standing still on the curb, watching the ego vehicle pass without stepping into the road.
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; remains stationary on the curb throughout, never entering the vehicle's lane.
subjects.clothing: White short-sleeve t-shirt with a printed red stop sign, light trousers, dusty boots.
subjects.expression: Calm, neutral, slightly squinting attentive gaze toward the vehicle.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Sun-weathered medium-tan skin tone with a matte, brightly lit complexion under harsh desert sun.
subjects.facial_features: Short dark hair, dark eyes narrowed against the sun, relaxed brow, no distinguishing marks visible at distance.

background_setting: The main street of a small desert town in the arid Southwest US under bright midday sun with shimmering heat haze. The two-lane dry cracked asphalt runs between low adobe and cinder-block storefronts with a dusty concrete sidewalk where a person can stand, sparse sun-bleached signage, a few parked pickups, and scattered desert scrub beyond. Distant open plain and mesas waver in the heat haze, conveying a quiet, sun-baked mid-day scene.

lighting.conditions: Harsh bright clear midday desert sun with heat shimmer.
lighting.direction: High overhead sun slightly behind the ego vehicle, front-lighting the pedestrian intensely.
lighting.shadows: Very short, hard shadows pooled directly beneath the pedestrian and objects; the front stays intensely lit.
lighting.illumination_effect: Harsh high-contrast illumination with heat shimmer in the distance; the red stop sign shirt graphic reads sharply in the strong sun.

aesthetics.composition: Forward-facing dashcam perspective down the desert-town main street, the pedestrian on the right dusty sidewalk; the cracked road leads toward heat-hazed mesas at the vanishing point.
aesthetics.color_scheme: Bleached tans and ochres of adobe, dust, and scrub under a pale hot sky, cracked grey asphalt, with the red stop sign on the white shirt as a vivid focal accent.
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Calm, hot, sparse mid-day desert-town drive.
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating low storefronts, sun-bleached signs, and heat-shimmer distortion in the distance.

cinematography.camera_motion: Smooth forward tracking shot as the ego vehicle drives steadily down the lane.
cinematography.framing: Wide shot showing the road, sidewalk, and surroundings from the driver's viewpoint.
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level dashcam perspective from inside the vehicle.
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus across the road scene, with the pedestrian remaining clearly resolved as the car approaches.
cinematography.lens_focal_length: Wide-angle, approximately 24mm equivalent typical of a dashcam.

context: Autonomous driving / ADAS scenario on a sun-baked desert-town main street demonstrating a stationary pedestrian on the curb with a distracting stop-sign graphic on clothing, while the ego vehicle correctly continues at speed in its lane.

actions.description: The ego vehicle drives smoothly forward along the desert-town main street under harsh midday sun; the pedestrian appears ahead on the right dusty sidewalk, facing the vehicle, with a stop sign clearly visible on their shirt.
The vehicle continues approaching at a steady speed through the heat shimmer; the pedestrian grows larger in frame but stays stationary on the curb.
The ego vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian, maintaining its lane and speed on the cracked asphalt; the pedestrian remains on the curb and never enters the road.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White bold uppercase letters centered on a red octagonal sign graphic printed on the pedestrian's white t-shirt.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the pedestrian's chest, visible on the right side of frame throughout the approach and pass.
text_and_signage_elements.context: A decorative stop-sign graphic on clothing that resembles a traffic sign but is not an actual traffic control device.

segments.description: The ego vehicle travels forward in its lane on dry cracked asphalt under harsh midday desert sun and heat shimmer, approaching the stationary pedestrian on the right dusty curb whose shirt displays a stop sign.
segments.key_changes: The pedestrian grows progressively larger in frame as the vehicle approaches; distant mesas waver in heat haze and vehicle speed remains steady.
segments.camera: Smooth forward tracking motion at constant speed, eye-level dashcam view.

segments.description: The ego vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian without slowing, staying in its lane; the pedestrian remains on the dusty curb and does not step into the road.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrian passes from midground to right foreground and out of frame; vehicle maintains speed and lane position.
segments.camera: Continued smooth forward tracking, no deceleration or steering away.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a sun-baked desert-town main street of cracked asphalt with adobe storefronts and heat-hazed mesas beyond, the ego vehicle moving steadily forward; a pedestrian stands on the right dusty sidewalk facing the camera, a red stop sign clearly printed on their white shirt. By 0:01-0:02 the pedestrian grows larger as the vehicle approaches at constant speed, remaining planted on the curb under harsh sun. Around 0:03 the vehicle continues smoothly without slowing, keeping its lane. From 0:03 to 0:05 the ego vehicle drives past the stationary pedestrian, who never steps into the lane, and the pedestrian shifts to the right foreground before leaving frame as the desert road continues ahead.
audio_description: Ambient sparse desert-town driving sounds: a steady engine hum, tire noise on cracked dry asphalt, a dry breeze, and distant emptiness. No speech and no music; the audio remains consistent with a smooth, uninterrupted drive.
